name: 18.6oz Stainless Steel Moscow Mule Mug Copper Finish - Threshold™: Hand Wash, Cold Beverages
description:
Serve delicious cocktails and mocktails using this Stainless Steel Moscow Mule Mug from Threshold™. Made of stainless steel, this mule mug is design in a copper finish for a rustic look. With a capacity of 18.6 ounces, it's great for serving a variety of cold drinks at parties or casual hangouts.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
